bounty_razor_01.title: Pirate Bounty
bounty_razor_01.description: Destroy the Razor-class pirate harassing the Kepler Belt shipping lane.

delivery_medicine_01.title: Medical Supplies
delivery_medicine_01.description: Deliver 5 units of Medicine to Fort Kepler. They're running low.

intel_echo_01.title: Dead Drop
intel_echo_01.description: Mira needs you to pick up a data chip at Nav Point Echo. Don't ask what's on it.

story_conspiracy_01.title: Follow the Money
story_conspiracy_01.description: Mira has a lead. The Militia's books don't add up — someone's skimming pirate loot.

story_ending_expose.title: Burn It Down
story_ending_expose.description: Expose the Militia's corruption to the Free Traders. This will have consequences.

story_ending_coverup.title: Bury It
story_ending_coverup.description: Help Commander Reyes suppress the evidence. The Militia pays well for silence.

story_ending_broker.title: Everyone Pays
story_ending_broker.description: Broker a deal: Militia pays a tithe to the pirates, everyone stays quiet.
